repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalization plan for five independent maintainer-ready PRs. None should be merged from this plan because the artifact lacks hydrated review/comment state, mergeability, and Codex /review proof. Prioritize narrow contributor-branch repairs in this order: #86893, #86776, #86676, #86674, then broad #86670.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

This repair path covers five independent open PRs from live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-037. Start by repairing contributor branches where maintainers can modify them, preserving source PR attribution. Do not merge until review comments and review-bot comments are hydrated, mergeability is known, Codex /review passes cleanly, and focused validation passes.

## Source PRs and Credit

- #86670 by @DinaAlSb: Eden AI provider plugin
- #86674 by @mvanhorn: cron description Summary in Control UI
- #86676 by @mvanhorn: configurable diagnostics.laneWaitWarnMs
- #86776 by @kierandotai: inline provider policy defaults
- #86893 by @dredozubov: isolated cron cold runner setup timeout

## Validation

- pnpm check:changed
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.inline-provider.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/process/command-queue.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts
- Codex /review with all findings addressed before merge

## Notes

#86670 is broad and includes dependencies/lockfile changes, so split or repair narrowly before considering merge. #86674 and #86676 have failing checks in the hydrated artifact. #86776 and #86893 appear closest to merge readiness, but still lack required review/comment hydration, mergeability, and Codex /review proof.
validation_commands: run Codex /review on any repaired merge candidate and address every finding
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for DinaAlSb from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86670 if the Eden AI provider work is replaced or split.
Preserve source PR credit for mvanhorn from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86674 if the cron Summary UI work is replaced.
Preserve source PR credit for mvanhorn from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86676 if the laneWaitWarnMs work is replaced.
Preserve source PR credit for kierandotai from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86776 if the inline provider default fix is replaced.
Preserve source PR credit for dredozubov from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86893 if the isolated cron setup timeout fix is replaced.
